title: The JOJO's Wonder Pack
description: This pack adding Stands and Fighting Styles from JOJO's Bizzare Adventure to Minecraft
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ad164a0a7b4f5692753f5cb05ab33767ea7591.png)


The JoJo's Wonder Pack is a PvP datapack based on the JoJo's Bizarre Adventure universe. It adds Stands and fighting styles to Minecraft, each with unique mechanics and great combo potential.

# FAQ
- How to get or get rid of a Stand?- Craft and use Stand Arrow or Stand Disk
![arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78691c3129880bc92ec98bf472275895e5b696a.png)![stand_disk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/374f3cfa807804e1b042cb12308d0bbbd05070a1.png)

- What stands and fighting styles are there at the moment?
